description: Small but brilliant — finds gaps in systems, reads the fine print nobody else does
personality_tr: Küçük ama akıllı, her deliği bilen, poliçenin ince yazısını okuyan tek karakter

expressions.default: alert, big bright eyes, whiskers twitching
expressions.eureka: light bulb above head, jumping with joy
expressions.suspicious: eyes narrowed, one finger raised, leaning forward

visual.size: very small, but moves with quick confident energy, wears a lab coat

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic grey mouse character, very small bipedal, wearing a tiny white lab coat, enormous magnifying glass, large deep blue eyes, pink nose, twitching whiskers, cartoon proportions, bright clean lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
catchphrases_tr: Küçüğüm ama ince yazıyı ben okurum!
Bu boşluğu ben yıllarca önce buldum.
